bio.name: Suryateja.R
bio.title: Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer
bio.description: I’m a passionate Software Engineer and Full Stack Developer who enjoys building modern, scalable, and user-focused applications. I love turning ideas into real-world solutions through clean code, thoughtful design, and efficient systems. From crafting engaging frontend experiences to developing robust backend architectures, I focus on creating products that are both functional and impactful. I’m constantly learning, building, and pushing myself to grow in the ever-evolving world of technology.

projects.title: Gender Prediction Using Sound
projects.description: AI-based voice recognition system to predict gender from audio samples.

projects.title: Minimal IP Geolocation Tracker
projects.description: Web application for network and geographical data visualization using IP addresses.

projects.title: ML-Based Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Machine learning project focused on analyzing sentiment in English literature.

updates.content: Expanded portfolio with education, skills, and certifications! 🎓
